outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED - Negative GEX amplifies all price movements. High PCR suggests potential for violent reversals.
outlook.summary: Negative GEX across all expiries (-8.42B total) creates volatile conditions with amplified moves. Extreme PCR (1.52-5.40) indicates oversold sentiment with contrarian bounce potential. Smirk skew (1.47-1.64) confirms fear but establishes strong put support structure. Max Pain cluster 683-684 provides upward magnetic target +1.5% from spot.

Deep support with 112K OI in M1. 0DTE vol/OI 5.0x shows tail risk hedging. Final structural support level.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH - Negative total GEX (-2.87B combined) amplifies price movements. Dealers short gamma will accelerate any directional move.
outlook.summary: Spot at critical 600 RESONANCE level with massive PUT concentration across all expiries. Bearish skew (1.32-1.65) and elevated PCR (1.08-2.00) confirm defensive positioning. Negative gamma environment creates volatility amplification. Max Pain cluster at 605-607 provides upward magnetic pull if 600 support holds. Break of 600 targets 595-590 confluence zone.

Cluster of Max Pain levels: 0DTE=607, WEEKLY_1=605, WEEKLY_2=606, MONTHLY_1=605. MM target zone where option value minimizes. Strong magnetic attraction if 600 holds.
WEEKLY_1 dominant PUT (62,550 OI - highest overall) + MONTHLY_1 significant (33,450 OI). Secondary support below 600. High volume confirms active hedging.
MONTHLY_1 massive PUT OI (101,564 - highest overall) + MONTHLY_2 (19,423). Deep institutional support. Target if 600 breaks convincingly.

MONTHLY_1 significant PUT OI (73,511) + WEEKLY_1 (10,102). Deep support layer. Only relevant in crash scenario given negative gamma environment.
